generated_note: Web-verified from primary sources on 2026-06-28 by the atlas research pass. Fields containing GAP were not confirmable verbatim and must be re-checked before build. EPIC-KITCHENS-100 is omitted here because it is already built.

planned.name: Ego4D
planned.license: Ego4D License (gated; redistribution restricted, GAP on verbatim terms)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target, gated: real #C/#O narrations behind license
planned.focus: Foundational 3,670-hour worldwide egocentric corpus with millions of timestamped free-form narrations and a multi-task benchmark suite.

planned.name: Ego-Exo4D
planned.source_datasets: original capture (paired ego + exo, skilled activity)
planned.license: Ego-Exo4D License (gated; redistribution restricted, GAP on verbatim terms)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target, gated: three real annotation streams behind license
planned.focus: Time-synchronized ego and exo video of skilled activity with atomic action descriptions, narrate-and-act narrations, and expert commentary.

planned.name: EgoVLP (EgoClip / EgoNCE / EgoMCQ)
planned.downloadable: open CSV (Ego4D-derived) via repo Drive links
planned.license: code MIT; data inherits Ego4D License (GAP, not restated)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target: egoclip.csv gives ~3.8M narration strings (Ego4D-derived)
planned.focus: A pre-filtered, cleaned text layer over Ego4D: ~3.8M clip-text pairs (EgoClip) plus the EgoNCE objective and the EgoMCQ choice benchmark.

planned.name: HD-EPIC
planned.license: CC BY 4.0 (data.bris portal; GAP: live GitHub LICENSE not confirmed)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target: open narrations, recipe steps, and VQA strings
planned.focus: Highly-detailed kitchen understanding: 59,454 fine-grained action segments (81% unique sentences), recipe steps, 3D twins, gaze, and a 26,650-question VQA benchmark.

planned.name: EgoSchema
planned.downloadable: open questions + options; correct-answer key withheld
planned.license: Ego4D License (questions LLM-generated then human-curated)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target: 5,031 question + option strings open (labels withheld)
planned.focus: Diagnostic long-form video-QA benchmark: 5,031 multiple-choice questions over 3-minute Ego4D clips requiring long temporal certificates.

planned.name: EgoVerse
planned.license: code MIT; dataset/annotation redistribution license not stated (GAP)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target: dense per-segment language, but redistribution terms unclear
planned.focus: Worldwide human egocentric platform, 1,362 h / ~80k episodes / 1,965 tasks, split into controlled EgoVerse-A and industry-scale EgoVerse-I with manipulation-relevant language.

planned.name: EgoDex
planned.license: CC BY-NC-ND: annotation-text redistribution NOT permitted
planned.suitability: analyze locally only: rich task language + 3D hand pose, but ND blocks sharing clustered text
planned.focus: 829 hours of Apple Vision Pro egocentric video with native 3D hand pose over 194 tabletop tasks, each with a GPT-generated task description.

planned.name: EgoVid-5M
planned.license: apache-2.0 for hosted annotations (Ego4D License on videos)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target: 5M MLLM/LLM action descriptions + captions, openly hosted
planned.focus: 5M egocentric clips (from Ego4D) paired with kinematic control and MLLM-plus-LLM action text for video generation. A clear VLM-authored annotation case study.

planned.name: OpenEgo
planned.source_datasets: CaptainCook4D, HOI4D, HoloAssist, EgoDex, HOT3D, HO-Cap
planned.license: mixed per-source (MIT code; constituents vary, some CC BY-NC-ND)
planned.suitability: download+cluster target with caveats: unified timestamped language primitives, mixed licenses
planned.focus: Consolidates six egocentric corpora (1,107 h, 290 tasks) into a unified 21-joint hand-pose format with intention-aligned, timestamped language primitives.

planned.name: OakInk2
planned.license: CC BY-SA 4.0: redistribution permitted with attribution + share-alike
planned.suitability: download+cluster target: open task and per-primitive language
planned.focus: Bimanual hand-object manipulation organized as Affordance, Primitive Task, and Complex Task, with LLM-decomposable task programs and per-primitive descriptions.

planned.name: DeMiAn (How to Instruct Your Robot)
planned.license: paper CC BY 4.0; dense annotations not released (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: the clearest dense-multi-aspect exemplar, but annotations unreleased
planned.focus: Studies language density as a lever: re-labels segments along four aspects (physical motion, scene, arm pose, reasoning) via Qwen3-VL, with a learned instructor selecting an annotation at deployment.

planned.name: PhysBrain
planned.license: not stated (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: revisit if E2E-3M is released
planned.focus: An Egocentric2Embodiment pipeline turning raw human egocentric video into schema-driven, evidence-grounded supervision across seven VQA modes, yielding the ~3M-instance E2E-3M dataset.

planned.name: R3M
planned.license: code MIT
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: publishes a frozen encoder, reuses Ego4D narrations
planned.focus: Pretrains a reusable visual representation on Ego4D via time-contrastive learning and video-language alignment for data-efficient manipulation.

planned.name: VIP
planned.license: code CC BY-NC 4.0
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: produces a reward/representation model, no annotation corpus
planned.focus: Learns a self-supervised goal-conditioned value function from unlabeled Ego4D video, providing dense visual rewards for unseen robot tasks.

planned.name: VRB (Vision-Robotics Bridge)
planned.license: code MIT
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: outputs contact + trajectory affordances, no language corpus
planned.focus: Trains a visual affordance model (contact heatmap plus post-contact wrist trajectory) from human video to drive several robot-learning paradigms.

planned.name: EgoMimic
planned.downloadable: HF data is hand-tracking + video (no language corpus)
planned.license: code MIT; HF dataset license not stated (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: releases an egocentric hand-tracking dataset, not a language corpus
planned.focus: Captures egocentric human data with Aria glasses and co-trains a unified human-plus-robot imitation policy on a kinematically-matched bimanual robot.

planned.name: HAT (Humanoid Policy ~ Human Policy)
planned.license: HF dataset MIT: redistribution permitted
planned.suitability: download+cluster target: a NEW open egocentric corpus with per-task language
planned.focus: Releases PH2D, ~27k egocentric human demos with language task specifications and 3D hand poses, and co-trains a Human Action Transformer with differentiable retargeting.

planned.name: ZeroMimic
planned.license: arXiv listing CC BY 4.0; code/checkpoint license not separately verified (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: distills EPIC-KITCHENS video into deployable policies, no language corpus
planned.focus: Distills image-goal-conditioned manipulation skills (open, close, pour, pick-place, cut, stir) from EPIC-KITCHENS human video for zero-shot robot deployment.

planned.name: EgoVLA
planned.license: code MIT; reused labels follow each source license (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: VLA reusing existing labels, no standalone corpus
planned.focus: Pretrains a VLA on egocentric human videos to predict wrist/hand actions, then retargets via inverse kinematics for a bimanual humanoid, with a new manipulation benchmark.

planned.name: Being-H0
planned.source_datasets: UniHand (11 sets incl. OakInk2, EgoDex, HoloAssist)
planned.downloadable: derived-only (checkpoints; UniHand text not released standalone)
planned.license: code MIT; full UniHand corpus license not released (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: signature UniHand instruction corpus not independently downloadable
planned.focus: A dexterous VLA pretrained from large-scale human hand videos via physical instruction tuning and part-level hand-motion tokenization, building the UniHand corpus.

planned.name: EMMA
planned.source_datasets: own egocentric human full-body motion + static robot data
planned.license: code/data license unspecified (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: trajectory/motion data only, no language corpus
planned.focus: Scales mobile manipulation by co-training egocentric human full-body motion with static robot data, avoiding mobile teleoperation.

planned.name: Phantom
planned.license: code MIT; paper CC BY 4.0
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: code-only human-to-robot pipeline, no language corpus
planned.focus: Trains manipulation from human-only video by converting demos to robot-compatible pairs via hand-pose estimation and visual editing (inpaint arm, overlay robot).

planned.name: EgoZero
planned.license: code MIT; paper CC BY 4.0
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: policy method, data not public, no language corpus
planned.focus: Learns closed-loop manipulation from Project Aria smart-glasses human demos with zero robot data, deployed zero-shot on a Franka gripper.

planned.name: MotionTrans
planned.source_datasets: own VR human manipulation + robot data
planned.license: code MIT; HF dataset has no license tag (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: ~30-task instruction set with local NL augmentation, not a standalone corpus
planned.focus: Transfers motion-level skills from VR-collected human demos to robots via a transformation pipeline and weighted human-robot co-training.

planned.name: LAPA (Latent Action Pretraining)
planned.license: code + weights MIT; consumed instruction text follows OXE/SSv2/Bridge (GAP)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: releases weights/code, no downloadable language corpus
planned.focus: Unsupervised VLA pretraining that learns discrete latent actions between frames from actionless and human video, then fine-tunes to robot actions.

planned.name: MAPLE
planned.license: no license file in repo (GAP, default all-rights-reserved)
planned.suitability: descriptive-only: contact + hand-pose priors, nothing clusterable
planned.focus: Learns encoder features predicting contact points and grasping hand poses at contact from egocentric images, reused to train dexterous manipulation policies.
